examples: This view has become the tenet of the modern linguistic approach to grammatical analysis.
My creed is love and you are its only tenet—you have ravished me away by a power I cannot resist.
The only moral tenet governing the conduct of business in the shop was that the goods should be genuine and the price fair.
Recently Tenet Healthcare facilities around the country have come under investigation and faced lawsuits.
Tenet, the big hospital chain, has shut down several of its hospitals in the hurricane zone.
